name: Portugal
hate_crime_protections: Comprehensive protections for sexual orientation, gender identity, race

remote_work_pathway.name: D7 Passive Income Visa
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: After 5 years of legal residence, eligible for PR or citizenship. Must maintain passive income and prove integration

skilled_worker_pathway.name: Skilled Worker Visa / EU Blue Card

protection_or_special_status.name: EU Asylum Procedure / Ancestry Visa (grandparent citizenship)
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Must be physically present in Portugal or apply at consulate with proof of Portuguese grandparent
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Lodge asylum application with immigration authorities (SEF) or submit citizenship documentation at consulate

name: Spain
hate_crime_protections: Strong protections under EU Framework Decision; includes sexual orientation, gender identity, race

remote_work_pathway.name: Digital Nomad Visa (Law 28/2022)
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: Eligible for permanent residence after 5 years; citizenship after 10 years of legal residence

skilled_worker_pathway.name: EU Blue Card / Highly Qualified Professional Visa

protection_or_special_status.name: EU Asylum Procedure / Law of Grandchildren (Spanish ancestry, extended to Oct 2025)
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence in Spain for asylum; proof of Spanish grandparent/exile descendant for ancestry
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Register asylum claim with National Police or submit heritage documentation at consulate

name: Germany
abortion_access_status: Legal on broad grounds (up to 12 weeks with counseling)
hate_crime_protections: Strong hate crime legislation covering sexual orientation, gender identity, race under Federal Criminal Code

remote_work_pathway.name: Freelance Visa (Freiberufler) - Section 21(5) Residence Act
remote_work_pathway.min_monthly_income: No fixed minimum; must prove financial means and project income
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: After 5 years of freelance activity can apply for permanent settlement permit; citizenship after 8 years

skilled_worker_pathway.name: EU Blue Card / Skilled Worker Visa (Section 18a/18b)

protection_or_special_status.name: EU Asylum Procedure / Citizenship by Descent (limited to parent born in Germany post-1975)
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence for asylum; birth after 1975 with German parent for descent
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit asylum application to Federal Office for Migration and Refugees (BAMF) or citizenship certificate at local authority

name: Mexico
hate_crime_protections: Variable by state; federal recognition of hate crimes based on sexual orientation since 2019

remote_work_pathway.name: Temporary Resident Visa (Non-Lucrative)
remote_work_pathway.min_monthly_income: $4,356 USD/month income OR $73,389 USD in savings (2026 estimates)
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: After 4 years of temporary residency, eligible for permanent residency. Citizenship after 5 years of PR

protection_or_special_status.name: Asylum via Mexican Commission for Refugee Assistance (COMAR) / Citizenship by Descent (parent born in Mexico)
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence in Mexico for asylum; proof of Mexican parent for descent
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit asylum request at any immigration office or COMAR; citizenship via consulate with parent's birth certificate

name: Costa Rica
hate_crime_protections: Limited hate crime protections; no specific LGBTQ+ hate crime laws

remote_work_pathway.name: Rentista Visa (Passive Income)
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: After 3 years, eligible for permanent residency; citizenship after 7 years of residency

protection_or_special_status.name: Refugee status determination via Costa Rican immigration / No major ancestry programs
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence and demonstration of persecution
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit application to Dirección General de Migración y Extranjería with UNHCR referral if applicable

name: Italy
hate_crime_protections: Protected under national hate crime laws; includes sexual orientation, gender identity

remote_work_pathway.name: Digital Nomad Visa (Decreto Flussi 2024)
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: After 5 years can apply for permanent EU long-term residence; citizenship after 10 years

skilled_worker_pathway.name: EU Blue Card / Nulla Osta Work Visa

protection_or_special_status.name: EU Asylum Procedure / Citizenship by Descent LIMITED (parent or grandparent only as of March 2025)
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence for asylum; proof of Italian parent/grandparent birth in Italy (great-grandparents no longer eligible as of 2025 reform)
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit asylum at border/Questura or citizenship application at Italian consulate with vital records

name: France
hate_crime_protections: Comprehensive protections under national law and EU directives

remote_work_pathway.name: Talent Passport - Qualified Employee
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: After 4 years of Talent Passport, eligible for 10-year resident card; citizenship after 5 years

protection_or_special_status.name: EU Asylum Procedure / Limited ancestry pathways (primarily for French parent)
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence for asylum; proof of French parent for citizenship
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Lodge asylum with prefecture (OFPRA); citizenship via consulate with parent documentation

name: Canada
hate_crime_protections: Federal hate crime legislation includes sexual orientation and gender identity

remote_work_pathway.name: Not applicable (no non-work digital nomad visa)

skilled_worker_pathway.name: Express Entry (Federal Skilled Worker, Canadian Experience Class)
skilled_worker_pathway.job_offer_required: No (points-based; job offer adds points but not mandatory)

protection_or_special_status.name: Refugee Status Determination via Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC)
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Must be outside Canada or at port of entry; claim protection at border or inland office
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit asylum claim at port of entry or IRCC office; attend hearing before Immigration and Refugee Board (IRB)

name: Netherlands
hate_crime_protections: Comprehensive hate crime protections under national law; includes sexual orientation, gender identity

remote_work_pathway.name: Not applicable (no specific digital nomad visa)

skilled_worker_pathway.name: Highly Skilled Migrant Permit
skilled_worker_pathway.processing_time: 5-10 weeks (digital portal); up to 90 days standard

protection_or_special_status.name: EU Asylum Procedure via Immigration and Naturalisation Service (IND)
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence in Netherlands or at border
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Register at Central Reception Centre (COL) in Ter Apel; complete registration interview with IND

name: Australia
abortion_access_status: Legal (varies by state; mostly on request)
hate_crime_protections: Hate crime laws vary by state; federal protections for sexual orientation, race

remote_work_pathway.name: Not applicable (no non-work digital nomad visa)

protection_or_special_status.name: Protection Visa (Refugee/Humanitarian) via Department of Home Affairs
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Must be in Australia or apply offshore through UNHCR referral
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Lodge protection visa application online or at immigration office; attend interview

name: New Zealand
hate_crime_protections: Hate crime and hate speech protections include sexual orientation, gender identity

protection_or_special_status.name: Refugee Status Determination via Immigration New Zealand
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence in New Zealand or apply at offshore location
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit expression of interest or refugee claim at Immigration New Zealand office or UNHCR referral

name: United Kingdom
hate_crime_protections: Protected characteristics include sexual orientation, race; gender identity protections weakening

protection_or_special_status.name: Asylum via UK Visas and Immigration (UKVI)
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence in UK or at port of entry
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit asylum claim to Home Office; attend substantive interview

name: Ireland
abortion_access_status: Legal on request (up to 12 weeks since 2018)
hate_crime_protections: Comprehensive hate crime legislation includes sexual orientation, gender identity

remote_work_pathway.name: Not applicable (no specific digital nomad visa)

protection_or_special_status.name: International Protection via International Protection Office (IPO)
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Make asylum application at International Protection Office; preliminary interview within 5 working days

name: Uruguay
hate_crime_protections: Comprehensive hate crime protections; sexual orientation and gender identity included

remote_work_pathway.name: Independent Means (Rentista) Visa
remote_work_pathway.processing_time: Immediate temporary residency; 6-12 months for permanent residency
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: Immediate permanent residency upon approval; citizenship after 3-5 years of residence

protection_or_special_status.name: Refugee Status Determination via National Commission for Refugees (CONARE)
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit asylum application to immigration authority (Dirección Nacional de Migración) or CONARE

name: Thailand
abortion_access_status: Legal with restrictions (health/economic/rape up to 22 weeks)
hate_crime_protections: Limited hate crime protections; Gender Equality Act 2015 covers some discrimination

remote_work_pathway.name: Elite Visa / Long-Term Resident Visa (varies)
remote_work_pathway.min_monthly_income: Varies by visa type ($25,000+ deposit for Elite)
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: Various pathways depending on visa; typically after 3-10 years can apply for permanent residence

skilled_worker_pathway.name: BOI-sponsored work permit / Non-Immigrant B Visa

protection_or_special_status.name: Refugee Status Determination via Ministry of Interior with UNHCR support
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit asylum claim to immigration bureau; UNHCR Bangkok provides RSD support

name: Japan
abortion_access_status: Legal with restrictions (spousal consent often required; health/economic/rape up to 22 weeks)
hate_crime_protections: Limited hate crime protections; no comprehensive LGBTQ+ hate crime laws

remote_work_pathway.name: Not applicable (no digital nomad visa; business manager visa requires incorporation)

protection_or_special_status.name: Refugee Recognition via Immigration Services Agency
protection_or_special_status.entry_requirement: Physical presence in Japan or at port of entry
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit asylum application at regional immigration office; undergo RSD interview

name: Argentina
abortion_access_status: Legal on request (up to 14 weeks since 2020)
hate_crime_protections: Federal hate crime protections include sexual orientation and gender identity

remote_work_pathway.name: Digital Nomad Visa (Transitory Residence)
remote_work_pathway.path_to_pr_citizenship: 6 months renewable once (total 1 year); does not lead to permanent residency directly

protection_or_special_status.name: Refugee Status Determination via National Commission for Refugees (CONARE)
protection_or_special_status.first_step: Submit asylum request to immigration office (Dirección Nacional de Migraciones) or CONARE
